---
title: "0xfefe_0002"
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-image: ./gifgit.gif
format:
  revealjs: 
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: false
    theme: [dark, custom.scss]
    menu: false
    auto-slide: 2000
    loop: true
    center: true
output-dir: out
---

#

::: {.r-fit-text}

| Slot |           | Speaker      | Title                                                           |
| ---- | --------- | ------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 00   | 19:20     | 0rganization | WELCOME                                                         |
| 01   | 19:30     | Thomas       | JavaScript considered harmful  |
| 02   | 19:45     | Arend        | Some early results from DESHIMA 2.0  |
| 03   | 20:00     | Willem       | I want to analyze firmware                                      |
| -    | 20:15     | BREAK        | -                                                               |
| 04   | 20:30     | TBA          | Attacking a Kyber Implementation with CPA | 
| 05   | 20:45     | Sergei       | Exploitation Against the Clock: Xiaomi S3 Smartwatch            |
| 06   | 21:00     | Niek         | Grading Sergei                                                  |
| -    | 21:15     | BREAK        | -                                                               |
| 07   | 21:30     | Jeffrey      | Your (function) signature here please                           |
| 08   | 21:45     | Quentin      | Raspberry Pi's attempts at creating a secure microcontroller    |
| 09   | 22:00     | Tim          | Industrial climbing                                             |
| -    | 22:15     | FINISH       | -                                                               |

:::

## 

![](./ctf-qr-2.svg)

:::{.r-stack}
[0xfefe.com/0002/ctf](https://0xfefe.com/0002/ctf)
:::

## 

![](./donate-qr.svg)

:::{.r-stack}
[0xfefe.com/donate](https://0xfefe.com/0002/donate)
:::
